title: TEVO Whack Game With Hammer - A Mole Bashing Classic Arcade Game For Kids - Electronic Kids Board Games - Toys For 3,4,5,6 Year Old Boys & Girls - Boys Toys Age 3 Plus - Batteries Included
features: JUST LIKE THE CLASSIC ARCADE GAME - Use the hammer to whack the moles and score points. It's even coin operated, just like the real thing!
INCLUDES FREE BATTERIES - Ready to play, straight out of the box!
HELP KEEP CHILDREN AWAY FROM SCREENS - Fun and engaging game that challenges children to improve by fun game play
FEATURES MULTIPLE GAME MODES - With both single and multiple player modes, it can be enjoyed by all the family, kids and adults alike, with varying degrees of difficulty
LCD SCREEN KEEPS TRACK OF YOUR SCORE - But be careful! Lose all 6 lives, your LED lights will go out and your turn is over!
